entity.summary: Oracle-based EVM decentralized exchange and vault platform with active swap volume, protocol fees, revenue, and multichain trading across Base and BNB Chain.
entity.notes: Current first-party ElfomoFi domain remains reachable. DefiLlama identifies ElfomoFi as an oracle-based EVM DEX and reports substantial current 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume together with fees and protocol revenue across Base and BNB Chain.

evidence.title: ElfomoFi official website
evidence.notes: Current dedicated first-party ElfomoFi domain remains reachable at review time.

evidence.title: ElfomoFi metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies ElfomoFi as an oracle-based EVM DEX and reports active 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume plus current fees and protocol revenue across Base and BNB Chain.

evidence.title: ElfomoFi DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies ElfomoFi as a Base and BNB Chain decentralized exchange.
